sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37647" key="e)couriko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξουρ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n37647.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cleared of whey,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">γάλα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Democr.</author> </bibl> </cit>Alch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1306.tlg001:p.54B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.54B.</biblScope> </bibl> (cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐξορίζω</foreign> (B)).</sense> </entryFree>
